meta.title: Kairos Studio — AI Automation for Operational Teams
meta.description: Jhon Escobar, AI automation consultant. n8n + LLMs to eliminate manual work for operational teams in Colombia.

hero.sub: One person, not an agency. Two real projects with numbers you can verify. You talk directly to the person who builds your solution.

problem.heading: Four signs your business needs automation

1.title: After-hours inquiries
1.body: Clients write outside your work day and the answer lands 12 hours late — or never.

2.title: Repetitive
2.body: Your team answers the same questions over and over. How much does it cost?, What do you sell?, Where are you located? An agent handles this in under 10 seconds.

3.title: Errors in key processes
3.body: Every mistake in billing, reports, or follow-up costs reputation, rework, and sometimes cash out of your own pocket.

4.title: Unclear
4.body: Without measurable results, the AI budget loses credibility. Proving its value becomes even harder as investments grow.

showcase.heading: We turn complexity into clear results.

aurora.title: Aurora
aurora.desc: AI agent that answers leads' inquiries 24/7, qualifies them, and escalates to the team when they're ready.

sura.title: CRM
sura.desc: Centralized system on SmartSuite with automated alerts and full payment traceability.

onboarding.title: Auto Onboarding
onboarding.desc: Client fills the form — in 15 seconds they have their folder, welcome email, and your team gets the Slack alert. No manual tasks, no delays, no errors.

conserje.title: 24/7 Concierge
conserje.desc: Guests get answers in seconds, at any hour. Questions, check-ins and coordination handled automatically — you only show up when something truly needs you.

process.heading: Four steps. No surprises.
process.partnerTag: Want to go further? → Partner Plan

1.title: Audit
1.body: I analyze your operations in depth: I identify where hours and money are being lost, and prioritize what generates the most impact before it scales.

2.title: Design
2.body: You get back a clear flow diagram, proposed stack, expected ROI, and a concrete timeline. Not a single line of code until you approve the plan.

3.title: Custom build
3.body: I build the automation integrated into your existing systems with the right tools for your case. Documentation included — no black box.

4.title: Delivery & optimization
4.body: Full documentation, team training, and I stay as support for the first 7 days. Launch is the beginning — not the end.

aboutPreview.heading: Jhon Edilson Escobar Vanegas
aboutPreview.bio: Technologist, automation consultant and builder. Two projects in production with auditable results. No intermediaries — you talk directly to the person who builds.

1.title: Repetitive
1.desc: Are the steps deterministic and identical each time?

2.title: High volume
2.desc: Does it consume more than 2 hours per week?

3.title: Error prone
3.desc: Do human errors have a real, measurable cost?

4.title: Scalable
4.desc: Is your business growth limited by this manual process?

high.title: Your process is highly automatable
high.desc: You meet the key criteria. A 20-minute call and I'll give you a concrete diagnosis with estimated ROI — no commitment.

mid.title: There's potential — worth exploring
mid.desc: You meet 2 of 4 criteria. That's enough to have a conversation and assess whether automation makes sense for your case.

low.title: May not be the right time
low.desc: Fewer than 2 criteria covered. Before automating, document the process and digitalize your inputs.

cta.heading: Your manual process has an expiration date.
cta.sub: A 20-minute call and you walk away with a concrete diagnosis — even if we never work together.

footer.tagline: Automations triggered at the right moment.

chat.welcome: Hi, I'm Nagi. Ask me anything about automation for your business.
chat.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Try again or book a call directly.

testimonials.heading: What those who've lived it say.

0.quote: Before, handling WhatsApp in real time meant having multiple people available all day — and messages still slipped through. Today it runs on its own, without adding headcount, and replies while we sleep. It's the single thing that freed up the most of our time.
0.name: Juan Fernando Londoño

1.quote: We used to deal with manual errors in policy records and hours every week reviewing renewals. Now the process runs automatically, error-free, and the alerts reach us before a problem ever gets to the client.
1.name: SURA Contact

meta.title: Services — AI Agents & Consulting | Kairos Studio
meta.description: FAQ Bot, Autonomous Agent and Partner Plan. Choose the automation level your business needs today.

hero.heading: Choose how you want to work with me.
hero.sub: From a simple FAQ bot to a long-term strategic partner. Pick the level your business needs right now.

agents.heading: What chatbot does your business need?
agents.footer: All WhatsApp-integrated · No client code required · Technical support included

1.name: FAQ Bot
1.tagline: Answers on its own — no one needs to be there
features: Available 24/7 — no office hours, no waiting
Instantly answers your 15–30 most common questions
Escalates to your team when it doesn't know
No AI — simple, fast, and predictable
1.nagiMessage: Hi Nagi, I'm looking at the FAQ Bot at Kairos. Can you help me understand if it's the right fit for my business?

2.name: Smart Bot
features: Understands what customers mean, not just exact keywords
Logs name, email, and intent directly to your CRM
Remembers the conversation thread (up to 8 messages)
Qualifies prospects before passing them to your sales team
2.comparison: The FAQ Bot only handles fixed questions. The Smart Bot understands how any customer writes, logs their data to your CRM, and qualifies the lead — all without any human stepping in.
2.nagiMessage: Hi Nagi, I'm looking at the Smart Bot at Kairos. Can you help me understand if it's the right fit for my business?

3.name: Autonomous Agent
3.tagline: Like an employee who never sleeps
features: Knows your business: searches your manuals, catalogs, and internal FAQs
Understands voice notes — never miss an audio message again
Remembers every customer: history and prior conversations
Qualifies, manages, and routes to the right channel automatically
Generates automatic weekly reports: leads and escalations
Never leaves a conversation unanswered — built-in error recovery
3.comparison: The Smart Bot captures leads. The Autonomous Agent works like a real employee: it searches your internal docs, understands voice notes, remembers every customer's history, and never leaves a conversation unanswered.
3.nagiMessage: Hi Nagi, I'm looking at the Autonomous Agent at Kairos. Can you help me understand if it's the right fit for my business?

consulting.heading: Before automating, you need to know what to automate.
consulting.desc: A diagnostic session to identify which processes are costing you the most time and money, which ones are worth automating — and which aren't. Real bottlenecks, found with data — not guesses.
features: Analysis of your current operational flows
Map of automatable processes with estimated ROI
Real bottleneck identification
Stack and priority recommendations
Deliverable: written report

partner.heading: Your automation team, built into yours.
partner.desc: Not a one-off vendor — a long-term strategic partner. I work hand-in-hand with your business to scale processes month by month, with priority access and solutions always tailored to you.
partner.nagiMessage: Hi, I'd like to learn more about the Kairos Partner Plan.

meta.title: About Jhon Escobar — Kairos Studio
meta.description: Technologist and AI automation consultant in Colombia. Two production systems with auditable results. No intermediaries.

bio.p1: Jhon Edilson Escobar Vanegas — software technologist and AI automation consultant.
bio.p2: I work from Barbosa, Antioquia, with clients who need their operations to scale without adding headcount. In under a year I built two production systems: an AI agent that processes 992 messages/month at 98.8% autonomy, and a CRM that eliminated calculation errors in an insurance operation.
bio.p3: I'm not an agency. No account manager, no sales team. If we decide to work together, you talk directly to the person who designs, builds, and delivers your solution. That shows in the speed, the depth of the diagnosis, and the price.
